subject: fix(mobile): collapse ContextBar to single row for single-page designs
body:
Save ~40px of vertical mobile screen space by hiding the pages row when
there's only 1 page. Cell grid, add-page button, and undo/redo share
one compact row. Pages row appears only for multi-page documents.
Also hide undo/redo on mobile when both are disabled to reduce noise.

Tags: ux, mobile, contextbar, layout
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
